title: Kagenti’s Approach to Multi-Agent Security for AI Agents
summary: Kagenti is an open source infrastructure for multi-agent security that uses identity and delegation chains to prevent data leaks in agentic AI systems. It implements identity-based security and zero-trust principles to protect multi-agent deployments in production.
writeup: This video introduces Kagenti, an open source infrastructure for multi-agent security in agentic AI systems. It explains how identity and delegation chains work to prevent data leaks across agents. The approach applies identity-based security and zero-trust principles to protect multi-agent deployments running in production.
